content_body: Thank you for such a wonderful weekend! We celebrated our now 9-year-old son, Jack's, birthday here! He and we loved it! Hiking with dad, making a campsite and fire, talking and laughing in the hot tub, taking us to school at the pool table, and on and on... The town is lovely, too, and Mercier is a definite stop! We will be back again!
title: Wonderful Weekend!
